name: Anya Musume (Fawnless AU)
description:
Fawnless AU is basically an alternate AU where Anya doesn't back down and is aggressive/angry to J*mmy. The crew also guess that J*mmy was the one who crashed the ship on purpose(Except Daisuke, bless his innocent heart.) I would guess that Swansea would assume J*mmy did it out of spite of Curly after finding out they were all gonna be fired after. Anya is also armed with a pipe that she carries on her and will 100% use to defend herself and her unborn baby against J*mmy if he tries anything.

Art by: @umikochannart on X/Twitter

https://x.com/umikochannart?mx=2

"Little explanation since ppl asked on IG too: Daisuke is unaware of what happened, but notices signs of Anya’s stress around J*mmy, he has a bad feeling and secretly decides to sleep in front of her door to keep an eye on her." - @umikochannart

This image genuinely broke me.
creator: ㅤㅤㅤㅤ   ㅤ
